_comment: Curated FOSS room impulse responses. The render path applies these via ffmpeg's afir convolution filter. Each space entry is independent of HRTF placement — a clip can have a room without binaural position, and vice versa. Run `inference/download_spatial_assets.sh` to fetch the entries that have URLs; drop your own IR WAVs into this directory and add them to spaces[] to extend.

spaces.label: Anechoic / Dry
spaces.description: No room reverb. Pure HRTF placement. Default for outdoor scenes, close-mic'd dialogue, or any sound you want to sit unmodified in the mix.

spaces.label: Vocal Booth
spaces.description: Tight, dead, treated voice-over booth. Tiny room with heavy absorption. Adds a hint of intimacy without any audible tail.

spaces.label: Small Bedroom
spaces.description: Small untreated room with furniture absorbing high frequencies. Use for intimate domestic scenes, phone calls, late-night confessions.

spaces.label: Office
spaces.description: Generic medium-sized office. Slight presence, short reverb tail, no obvious flutter. Good utility space for workplace scenes.

spaces.label: Stairwell
spaces.description: Concrete fire escape — narrow, hard surfaces, flutter echo and a noticeable tail. Great for tension scenes, footsteps, chase sequences.

spaces.label: Long Hallway
spaces.description: Indoor corridor with slap-back from the far wall. Pinches voice slightly, gives footsteps that institutional feel — hospitals, schools, hotels.

spaces.label: Small Hall
spaces.description: Community hall or large rehearsal room. Medium reverb tail (~1.5s), present but not theatrical. Lectures, meetings, small live performances.

spaces.label: Concert Hall
spaces.description: Mid-size orchestral hall, ~2s decay with rich early reflections. Use for performance scenes, broadcast booths, anywhere wanting that designed-acoustic feel.

spaces.label: Opera House
spaces.description: Large velvet-and-gilt performance hall. Long, warm decay (~3s) with a clear early-reflection signature. The space of grand drama.

spaces.label: Stone Church
spaces.description: Medium-sized stone church. ~4s decay, prominent low-mid coloration. Sermons, weddings, choral scenes, anywhere you want sanctity without going full cathedral.

spaces.label: Cathedral
spaces.description: Vast stone cathedral (York Minster vibe). ~6–9s decay, deep modal resonances. The classic 'voice of God' space. Use sparingly; intense.
spaces.source: OpenAir Library — York Minster (Damian Murphy, U. York)

spaces.label: Mausoleum
spaces.description: Hamilton Mausoleum-style chamber. ~15s decay, eerie modal ringing. The signature 'longest reverb in the world' acoustic. Pure dread.

spaces.label: Cave
spaces.description: Limestone cavern. Complex non-uniform reflections, ~4s irregular tail, audible flutter. Spelunking, underground scenes, anything subterranean.
spaces.source: OpenAir Library — Koli national park cave

spaces.label: Forest
spaces.description: Wooded outdoor space. Almost dry but with sparse, diffuse reflections from distant trees. Adds ambient depth without sounding 'indoors'.
